# Fleet Application Management

Manage OCI Fleet Application Management resources from Kubernetes with a generatedruntime staging baseline.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `fleetappsmanagement` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-fleetappsmanagement-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-fleetappsmanagement:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-fleetappsmanagement-bundle:<version>` |
